reason: A subversive cartoonist isolates himself to capture genius, the walls closing in with every fevered brush stroke.
Eerie persistence drives a B-movie auteur to torment, each production a tighter prison of his unyielding vision.
A musical prodigy’s obsessive rise strains every bond, the studio’s glare magnifying his every cruel perfectionism.
A country chef converts disused barns, her single-minded passion eroding friendships in a storm of flour dust.
A director returns home to cut reel memories, his muse slipping through the splices of memory and ambition.
A celebrated actress grinds through shoot after shoot, every take tearing at the seams of her fragile relationships.
A rock star’s vision forces bandmates away, the tour bus’s walls echoing each compromise he refuses to make.
A journalist’s hunger for the story consumes her, the probe of a grisly murder widening a gulf to her own conscience.
An editor’s pursuit of his magnum opus isolates him, every word penned tearing deeper into his erratic psyche.
A documentarian immerses himself in a battle to unmask evil, the camera’s lens a merciless confession of obsession.
